text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: A team of people creating medicines and solutions that put impact first: for patients, communities and our world.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: At AbbVie, our people are dedicated to putting patients at the center of everything we do. Every breakthrough, every innovation, and every step forward is inspired by the real lives we touch—working together to improve health and bring hope to individuals and families around the world. Get to know the passionate people who make up AbbVie and the difference we strive to make, one patient at a time.

custom_title_0.name: Custom Title
custom_title_0.title: Driven by science, united by purpose

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: Our scientists, researchers and doctors? Inspired by real stories.

cta_2.aria-label: Meet our inspiration Opens in same window
cta_2.name: Cta

teaser_0.description: AbbVie’s mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that address complex health issues and enhance people's lives.
teaser_0.name: Teaser
teaser_0.title: Meeting the needs of our times

quote_0.attributionRole: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
quote_0.name: Quote
quote_0.quotation: Never underestimate the power and dedication of ~57,000 employees around the world united in the same mission — to make a remarkable impact for our patients, improve our society and support our communities.

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: Every solution starts with the patient’s perspective, because transformative medicines only matter when they are safe, effective and accessible to everyone who needs them.

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: We are making significant advancements with a robust pipeline of potential new medicines as we look to find the treatments of tomorrow.

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: We are driven by our compassion for people, commitment to innovation and inclusion, service to the community and uncompromising integrity.

cta_2.aria-label: Our principles Opens in same window
cta_2.name: Cta

teaser_0.ariaLabel: Meet our leaders Opens in same window
teaser_0.description: Our leaders’ vision and expertise guide our teams, while their commitment to patients fuels our culture.
teaser_0.name: Teaser
teaser_0.title: Our mission to improve lives starts at the top

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text:
AbbVie was founded in 2013 when we became a separate company from Abbott. Our name represents a proud connection to that legacy.

Since the beginning, our mission hasn't wavered. Our combination of focused innovation and commercial scale brings differentiated products to market that benefit patients, customers and health care providers.

cta_2.aria-label: explore our history Opens in same window
cta_2.name: Cta

grid_container.backgroundAlt: man and woman walking along a lake
grid_container.name: Grid Container
